entities.name: SORGHUM
entities.description: The specific crop whose genetic resources are being discussed at ICRISAT

entities.name: GENETIC RESOURCES
entities.description: Genetic material of plants that is of value as a resource for the present and future generations of people

entities.name: ICRISAT
entities.description: The International Crops Research Institute for the Semi-Arid Tropics, which manages sorghum genetic resources

entities.name: FOOD AND AGRICULTURE ORGANIZATION
entities.description: An inter-governmental platform that recognized genetic resources as the common heritage of mankind

entities.name: UNITED NATIONS
entities.description: The international organization under which the Food and Agriculture Organization operates

relationships.description: Sorghum is the crop for which genetic resources are being assessed
ICRISAT maintains the current status of sorghum genetic resources
FAO recognized the importance of genetic resources as the common heritage of mankind
The Food and Agriculture Organization operates under the umbrella of the United Nations
